session.tool_result: Todos have been modified successfully. Ensure that you continue to use the todo list to track your progress. Please proceed with the current tasks if applicable
session.assistant:
Plan execution complete. Here's a summary of what was implemented:
**Changes made:**
1. **`src/erk/cli/commands/land_learn.py`**: - Updated `_log_session_summary_from_manifest` to accept `xml_files` and `plan_id` keyword arguments - Added manifest source line: `Manifest: planned-pr-context/{plan_id} :: .erk/sessions/manifest.json (N session(s))` - Added per-file rows (dimmed) under each session showing filename and size - Added `_file_size_from_xml_files` helper to look up file sizes by suffix matching - Updated `_collect_session_material` call site to pass the new parameters - Updated `_log_learn_pr_files` to no longer list XML files individually (they're shown in the manifest table), while still counting them in the total
2. **`tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_land_learn.py`**: - Added tests for `_log_session_summary_from_manifest` (per-file sizes, empty sessions) - Added tests for `_file_size_from_xml_files` (match by suffix, missing file) - Updated `_log_learn_pr_files` tests to reflect that XML filenames are no longer listed individually
**PR:** https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8975
